mapper.select: SELECT board_id AS boardId, name, description, use_yn AS useYn FROM boards WHERE use_yn = TRUE ORDER BY board_id
SELECT board_id AS boardId, name, description, use_yn AS useYn FROM boards ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT board_id AS boardId, name, description, use_yn AS useYn FROM boards WHERE board_id = #{boardId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards(name, description, use_yn) VALUES(#{name}, #{description}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
